projects.title: Quincenera
projects.desc: A PAST project RSVP website designed for special events. Features include event details, an online RSVP form, countdown timer, photo gallery, schedule, and mobile-friendly design, making it easy for guests to stay informed and respond online.

projects.title: Hernandez Detailing
projects.desc: A currently running detailing businesses website designed by us.

hero.desc: A creative studio serving Rocky Mount and the surrounding region — websites, branding, and digital experiences built with care.

about.p1: 3L Website Design start up. is a creative studio based in Rocky Mount, NC. We work with local businesses, nonprofits, and entrepreneurs to build a strong digital presence.
about.p2: From custom websites to brand identities, every project is treated with the same care and attention — no templates, no shortcuts.
about.p3: Proudly rooted in Rocky Mount. Available locally and remotely across the USA.
